purpose: Common post-quote blockers for German residential solar and adjacent home-energy offers. These records help a sales assistant explain what is blocking the customer and what proof or task type can resolve it.

objection_format.name: Human-readable objection.
objection_format.customer_wording: Example wording or fragments from reviews, forums, debriefs, and sales notes.
objection_format.underlying_concern: What the customer likely needs resolved.
objection_format.proof_that_helps: Evidence or artifact that can reduce uncertainty.
objection_format.best_task_types: Fit among Phone Call, Send Email, Meeting in person, Send WhatsApp Video Message, Send Gift.
objection_format.missing_data_to_check: Inputs needed before making strong claims.
objection_format.related_buyer_signals: Signals commonly connected to the objection.
